one_line_thesis: ACM Research is a specialized semicap equipment vendor focused on wet clean and electroplating tools for logic and advanced packaging fabs.

deep_dive.executive_summary:
ACM Research is a specialized semicap equipment vendor focused on wet clean and electroplating tools for logic and advanced packaging fabs. FY2025 results show top-line momentum ($901 million revenue, +15% YoY) but compressed margins and a working-capital trough that collapsed operating cash flow to $10 million. The business is understandable as a capital-cycle equipment name with a narrow technology niche, but the bear case is only partially bounded at today's multiple.

At about $82.52 per share, we expect about -10.33% per year over seven years on the mechanical synthesis base case. Proo...

pricing_analysis.conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (Predictable cash-flow security). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.
pricing_analysis.economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ACMR, including wet clean equipment owner cash, backlog option, net financial claims, and cycle reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 diluted net income $92.149M / diluted EPS $1.37 (ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and option claims are valued once; cash, debt, and reserves are separate components with unique overlap keys.

risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental capex for backlog fulfillment embedded in normalized owner cash; no separate remaining-capital claim.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: The current component schedule is the first decision-grade baseline; attribution begins with the next dated valuation snapshot.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and option claims are valued once; cash, debt, and reserves are separate components with unique overlap keys.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Wet clean and electroplating equipment operations
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm: FY2025 revenue $901.309M, operating income $109.429M, cash $757.373M, total debt $214.012M, deferred revenue $252.486M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Margin and working-capital stress in cycle reserve.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Advanced packaging and deferred-revenue backlog option
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm: FY2025 revenue $901.309M, operating income $109.429M, cash $757.373M, total debt $214.012M, deferred revenue $252.486M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low case zero; base does not assume full backlog NPV.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Backlog ships as advanced packaging tools install; [Assumption] 3-year base.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Deferred revenue $252M at 12/31/2025; base assumes partial conversion over three years without heroics.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental capex for backlog fulfillment embedded in normalized owner cash; no separate remaining-capital claim.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm: FY2025 revenue $901.309M, operating income $109.429M, cash $757.373M, total debt $214.012M, deferred revenue $252.486M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Low/high stress cash and debt bands.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Semicap cycle, customer concentration, and working-capital reserve
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm: FY2025 revenue $901.309M, operating income $109.429M, cash $757.373M, total debt $214.012M, deferred revenue $252.486M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

timeline.label: Q1 2026 10-Q: revenue $231.3M (+34% YoY), net income $17.3M; cash $872.3M; debt $234.2M
FY2025 10-K: revenue $901.3M (+15% YoY), operating income $109.4M, OCF $10.3M; deferred revenue $252.5M
FY2024 10-K baseline: revenue $782.1M, operating income $151.0M, OCF $152.5M
Shanghai STVC files SC 13D/A showing continued activist-style ownership stake
Shanghai STVC initial SC 13D filing; large shareholder with board influence intent
FY2021 10-K: revenue $257.8M; company scaling wet clean platform post-IPO growth phase
Initial public offering on Nasdaq; raises growth capital for China and global fab expansion
ACM Research founded; focuses on wet clean equipment for semiconductor manufacturing

industry.structure: Semiconductor capital equipment oligopoly for front-end and advanced packaging: Applied Materials, Lam Research, and Tokyo Electron dominate broad segments; ACMR competes in specialized wet clean and electroplating niches with high customer qualification barriers.
industry.share_shift: ACMR gained share in wet clean and SAPS tools as China fabs expanded capacity; FY2025 revenue +15% YoY but margin compression signals intensifying competition and mix shift.
industry.trend: Advanced packaging (HBM, chiplets) drives electroplating and cleaning tool demand; U.S. export controls and China fab spending cycles create volatility in order timing and cash conversion.
